zh.Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England: 英國英格蘭爾鄧翰 梅西
zh.lifeSummary: 當John Massey於1546年出生在英國英格蘭爾普丁頓時，他的父親William de Pontington Massey32歲，母親Anne Booth32歲。他於1579年7月6日與Elizabeth Ashton在英國爾塔爾波利結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1610年4月21日在英國英格蘭爾普丁頓享年64歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾伯頓。

zh-hans.Dunham Massey, Cheshire, England: 英国英格兰爾鄧翰 梅西
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当John Massey于1546年出生在英国英格兰爾普丁頓时，他的父亲William de Pontington Massey32岁，母亲Anne Booth32岁。他于1579年7月6日与Elizabeth Ashton在英国爾塔爾波利结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1610年4月21日在英国英格兰爾普丁頓享年64岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾伯頓。

nameMeanings.name: Massey
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Massy, a pet form of Matthew . Compare Mace .
English (of Norman origin): habitational name from one or more of several places in Normandy, such as Macey (Manche), Massy (Seine-Maritime), Macé-sur-Orne (Orne), and La Ferté Macé (Orne).

variants.name: Mace
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Masse, probably a shortened form of Matthew (compare Massey and Massett ) or possibly of Thomas .
French and Breton (Macé): from the French personal name Macé, a vernacular form of Mathieu ‘Matthew’. Compare Masse 5 and Maze 3.

French (Macé): habitational name from Macé or La Ferté-Macé in Orne, the former so named from Gallo-Roman Macciacum (from the personal name Maccius + the locative suffix -acum), the latter from the personal name Macé (see 2 above).

variants.name: Massee
meanings: Possibly an altered form of English   Massey  .
French (Massée): from the feminine form of Massé (see Masse ). This surname is rare in France.

variants.name: Massa
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Angelo, Sal, Antonio, Silvio, Annamarie, Biagio, Caesar, Carmela, Dante, Elisabetta, Ennio.

Italian: habitational name from any of various places called Massa, for example Massa Lubrense or Massa di Somma, both in Naples province, or Masse d'Albe in Aquila, all named from medieval Latin massa ‘farm, estate’ (from Latin massa ‘mass, lump, pile’, Greek maza). This surname is also found in southern France (see Massey 5).

variants.name: Matthew
meanings: English and Scottish: from the Middle English personal name Ma(t)thew, a vernacular form of the Greek New Testament name Matthias, Matthaios, which is ultimately from the Hebrew personal name Matityahu ‘gift of God’. This was taken into Latin as Mat(t)hias and Matthaeus respectively, the former being used for the twelfth apostle (who replaced Judas Iscariot) and the latter for the author of the first Gospel. In many European languages this distinction is reflected in different name forms. The commonest vernacular forms of the personal name, including English Matthew, Old French Matheu, Spanish Mateo, Italian Matteo, Portuguese Mateus, Catalan and Occitan Mateu are generally derived from the form Matthaeus. In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, including German Matthias , Greek Mathias and Mattheos, Assyrian/Chaldean Matti , Czech Matěj, Slovak, Croatian, and Slovenian Matej . The name Matthew is also found among Christians in southern India (compare Mathai ), but since South Indians traditionally do not have hereditary surnames, the southern Indian name was in most cases registered as such only after immigration of its bearers to the US. Compare Mathew , see also Matthews .

variants.name: Macey
meanings: Americanized form of Slovak and Rusyn (from Slovakia) Macej or Mačej and Polish Maciej , derivatives of the Latin personal name Matthaeus (see Matthew ).

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

en.lifeSummary: When John Massey was born in 1546, in Puddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William de Pontington Massey, was 32 and his mother, Anne Booth, was 32. He married Elizabeth Ashton on 6 July 1579, in Tarporley, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 21 April 1610, in Puddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 64, and was buried in Burton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque John Massey est né en 1546, à Puddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William de Pontington Massey, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Anne Booth, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Ashton le 6 juillet 1579, à Tarporley, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 21 avril 1610, à Puddington, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 64 ans, et a été enterré à Burton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als John Massey 1546 in Puddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater William de Pontington Massey 32 und seine Mutter Anne Booth 32. Er hat am 6. Juli 1579 in Tarporley, Cheshire, England Elizabeth Ashton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 21. April 1610 im Alter von 64 Jahren in Puddington, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Burton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

Lui sposato Elizabeth Ashton il 6 luglio 1579, nel Tarporley, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: John Masseyが1546年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプウッドイントンで生まれた時，父William de Pontington Masseyは32歳，母Anne Boothは32歳であった。1579年7月6日にイギリスチェシュアイアタープオルリーでElizabeth Ashtonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1610年4月21日にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアプウッドイントンで64歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアブルトンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: John Massey(이)가 1546년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 푸딩턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William de Pontington Massey(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Anne Booth(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1579년 7월 6일 영국 체실르 터아르포를리에서 Elizabeth Ashton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1610년 4월 21일 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 푸딩턴에서 64세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버턴에 묻혔다.

Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Ashton em 6 de julho de 1579, em Tarporley, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. ru.lifeSummary: Когда John Massey родился в 1546 г. в местности пуддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени William de Pontington Massey было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Anne Booth, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Ashton 6 июля 1579 г. в местности тарпорли, чешир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 21 апреля 1610 г. в местности пуддингтон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 64 лет и был похоронен в местности буртон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.
